seoTitle: Paradise Beach vs Park Orchards — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Paradise Beach and Park Orchards. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Paradise Beach vs Park Orchards: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paradise Beach and Park Orchards.
heading: Paradise Beach vs Park Orchards — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paradise Beach, Victoria and Park Orchards, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Park Orchards has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Paradise Beach (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paradise Beach or Park Orchards safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paradise Beach has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Park Orchards scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paradise Beach scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Park Orchards scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paradise Beach or Park Orchards?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Park Orchards has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
